description: In-pi read-schema correction — the one authorized in-pi op change in this release. Closes FGAP-027: pass whole:true into structureForRead at ops-registry.ts:1166 for the addressed-node case so the IN-PI read-schema op returns the full subtree (matching scripts/orchestrator/read-schema.ts:181), retaining the 50KB cap. Completes read-schema across BOTH surfaces (pairs with the order-2 task's FGAP-020 CLI-side fix). Class-check other read ops routing addressed object nodes through structureForRead.
acceptance_criteria: FGAP-027 closed: in-pi read-schema --path at an object node returns the full subtree
{read} cap behavior unchanged (50KB retained, no leak)
Class-check: no other read op silently projects an addressed object node
Canonical pipeline green (incl. runtime demo via pi -p tool dispatch + fresh adversarial audit)
notes: Release-group: cli-parity (NEXT) | order 4/5 | addresses FGAP-027 | the SOLE in-pi op change in this release | depends on order-2 (read-schema coherence across both surfaces)
